title: Migrate servers and workloads in on-premises and hybrid environments
summary: Migrate servers and workloads in on-premises and hybrid environments

sections.title: Migrate servers and workloads in on-premises and hybrid environments
sections.summary: Migrate servers and workloads in on-premises and hybrid environments

lessons.title: Migrate on-premises Windows Server instances to Azure IaaS virtual machines
lessons.content_md:
You're able to plan a migration and select appropriate server migration tools. You'll also learn how to use Azure Migrate, how to assess physical servers, and how to migrate those servers.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-premises-windows-server-instances-azure-iaas-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate on-premises Windows Server instances to Azure IaaS virtual machines

lessons.title: Upgrade and migrate Windows Server IaaS virtual machines
lessons.content_md:
Learn to migrate a workload running in Windows Server to an infrastructure as a service (IaaS) virtual machine (VM) and to Windows Server 2025 by using Windows Server migration tools or the Storage Migration Service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/upgrade-migrate-windows-server-iaas-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Upgrade and migrate Windows Server IaaS virtual machines

lessons.title: Active Directory Domain Services migration
lessons.content_md:
Determine the best approach to moving domain controllers to Windows Server 2025.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/active-directory-domain-services-migration/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Migrate file server workloads using Storage Migration Service
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use Storage Migration Service to migrate files and files shares from existing file server to new servers running Windows Server. Configure storage migration for optimum performance of data migration.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-file-server-workloads-using-storage-migration-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate file server workloads using Storage Migration Service

lessons.title: Migrate Windows Server roles
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to install and use the Windows Server Migration Tools cmdlets to migrate commonly used server roles from earlier versions of Windows Server.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-windows-server-roles/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Migrate servers and workloads in on-premises and hybrid environments
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Migrate servers and workloads in on-premises and hybrid environments**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
